step1.businessDescription: Harbor Lane Studio is a two-person brand design studio for independent retailers. We refresh in-store signage, packaging, and window graphics without a full rebrand — one type family, a tight palette, and staff-ready templates.

step2.painPoints: Owners approve signage alone — chalkboards, bag stamps, and window vinyl do not match. Staff guess at fonts and colors every week.
step2.desiredOutcomes: One visual system the owner and weekend manager can update without breaking the look. Customers recognize the shop from the window, not just the name on the door.

voiceSamples: We keep the system small on purpose — if your weekend manager cannot update it, it will not stick.

step4.missionStatement: Make independent retail look as intentional as the products on the shelf.

step5.originSummary: Started after helping a friend's bookstore redo its window display in a weekend.

step6.visualNotes: Favor natural materials in photography; avoid neon accents.

step7.differentiation: We only ship systems a three-person team can maintain — no 80-page decks.
